可以查看這個網站, 然後打電話聯絡店家進行詢問.

基本注意事項
1. IPS/VA/TN差距為何很重要, 請自行爬文研究.
2. 4K遊戲, 顯示卡2080或以上才有資格跑, 顯示卡差只能降解析度跑
3. 看影片, 沒有50%時間以上都玩競技型(FPS/賽車)遊戲, TN直接淘汰, 選VA or IPS
4. PS4/PS4 Pro/Switch不支援2k輸出, 只支援FHD, 顯示到2k螢幕會需放大較模糊些, 優先選擇FHD產品
5. 4K + TN螢幕, 全部都是垃圾, 不需考慮.
6. TN + 60hz產品,不具參考價值.
7. HDR10=格式，HDR400-1400=認證。目前主流HDR資源都係HDR10格式 市面上HDR MON HDR10性能有高有低 所以VESA 搞左個displayHDR認證
分為HDR400/500/600/1000/1400 另外仲有UHD premium認證 大概等同HDR1000 冇任何認證會只標支援HDR10

BenQ Launches SW321C 32-inch Monitor

BenQ announced the latest addition to its monitor family design for professional use. The SW321C, as it is called, is a 32-inch monitor with an IPS panel of 4K (3840×2160p) resolution. The panel itself is a 60 Hz screen with 250 nits of brightness, 1000:1 contrast ratio, 5 ms GtG response time, and it offers 178-degree viewing angles, which is standard for IPS panels. When it comes to the color coverage and the ability to accurately represent them, the SW321C features 95% of the DCI-P3, 99% of the Adobe RGB, and 100% of the sRGB color gamut. It has a 16-bit 3D look-up table (LUT) and features calibration for DeltaE ≤ 2.

The monitor comes with HDR10 specification, however, due to the brightness of 250 nits, it is not capable of performing any serious HDR content editing. Another interesting note is that this monitor supports Hybrid Log-Gamma (HLG) standard, which is an uncommon one. For input, the monitor had support for one DisplayPort 1.4, two HDMI 2.0, and one USB-C port. There is a dual-port USB hub, which has an SD card reader right next to it, making this very useful feature for photographers. Exact pricing and availability of this monitor are unknown, however, it is supposed to hit the market soon.

睇過外國forum有pg279q用家轉用xg279q後有以下嘅comment

//
I'm the perfect person to answer your question because I got my Asus XG279Q about a week ago and I got it as an upgrade from my PG279Q (the PG279Q is basically identical to the VG27AQ).

First, let me say that I love my PG279Q. The picture quality of my PG279Q is simply amazing. Whether it's the brightness, contrast, colors, refresh rate, build quality and aestetics of the monitor, all of the boxes are checked and get an A+....except for one thing. That one thing is the response time.

The response time of the PG279Q is actually pretty good, comparatively speaking, but it's not quite good enough for me. I only noticed the blurring when I was really really looking for it, particularly only in competitive fist person shooters. But the slower response time was noticeable.

The 1ms advertised response time on the XG279Q was the main selling point for me because I loved everything about my PG279Q except for the slightly slower response time. Well, the XG279Q hits it out of the park because it plays and feels like a TN panel in terms of the responsiveness but maintains the amazing picture quality of my PG279Q.

And I didn't think it would be possible but the picture quality on my new XG279Q actually surpasses that of my PG279Q. The colors are richer and the contrast has improved too, in my opinion.

Hopefully this helps. I think that the XG279Q is about to become one of the most popular and highly rated monitors on the market once more people get their hands on it
//

xg279q嘅真1ms同pg279q嘅4ms比，明顯有分別，xg279q似用緊tn嘅感覺，但又有ips嘅色彩豐富度同埋廣色域hdr

睇過外國forum有pg279q用家轉用xg279q後有以下嘅comment

//
I'm the perfect person to answer your question because I got my Asus XG279Q about a week ago and I got it as an upgrade from my PG279Q (the PG279Q is basically identical to the VG27AQ).

First, let me say that I love my PG279Q. The picture quality of my PG279Q is simply amazing. Whether it's the brightness, contrast, colors, refresh rate, build quality and aestetics of the monitor, all of the boxes are checked and get an A+....except for one thing. That one thing is the response time.

The response time of the PG279Q is actually pretty good, comparatively speaking, but it's not quite good enough for me. I only noticed the blurring when I was really really looking for it, particularly only in competitive fist person shooters. But the slower response time was noticeable.

The 1ms advertised response time on the XG279Q was the main selling point for me because I loved everything about my PG279Q except for the slightly slower response time. Well, the XG279Q hits it out of the park because it plays and feels like a TN panel in terms of the responsiveness but maintains the amazing picture quality of my PG279Q.

And I didn't think it would be possible but the picture quality on my new XG279Q actually surpasses that of my PG279Q. The colors are richer and the contrast has improved too, in my opinion.

Hopefully this helps. I think that the XG279Q is about to become one of the most popular and highly rated monitors on the market once more people get their hands on it
//

xg279q嘅真1ms同pg279q嘅4ms比，明顯有分別，xg279q似用緊tn嘅感覺，但又有ips嘅色彩豐富度同埋廣色域hdr

XG279Q深入評測 殘體注意！
https://www.xxrsm.com/h-nd-220.html#_np=2_704

【小雪人144期】流暢與快感齊飛，全球首款FastIPS絕殺電競顯示器 ROG Strix XG279Q評測報告
二維碼 3303
發表時間：2020-01-04 18:43

前言：

Hello 大家新年好。小雪人在這裡給各位鐵子們拜個年。 2019年中旬的時候，nanoIPS面板的問世把IPS電競推向了頂峰。各個品牌都爭相推出nanoIPS面板的電競顯示器，包括原廠生產的LG，以及使用了nanoIPS面板的聯想、優派、宏碁...然而華碩在12月初的時候推出了一款搭載了名為FastIPS （快速液晶）的新IPS面板，同樣可以達到原生GTG的1ms的絕殺電競顯示器。那麼今天我們要評測這一款就是全球首款搭載了這款FastIPS面板的華碩絕殺電競顯示器-XG279Q：FastIPS、2560×1440分辨率、170hz、1ms、95% DCI-P3、VESA DisplayHDR 400、 ELMB SYNC、NVIDIA G-SYNC兼容技術、2W x 2立體聲音響....那麼我們就來看下它具體表現吧，進入評測環節。

(刪去部分)

二、色域 10分（滿分10分）

XG279Q官方給出的出廠數值是95% DCI-P3和125% sRGB色域容積，但是通過我們的測試，XG279Q的實測數值要比出廠的數值要更高一些，sRGB的色域容積範圍可以達到141.9 %，DCI-P3容積也達到了100.5%。這樣的色域表現目前屬於第一梯隊，得分滿分，10分。


三、色深 8分 （滿分10分）

進入工廠模式，我們可以看到XG279Q的面板型號是270DAN06_6。從270DAN06_6面板規格書中顯示是8 bits RGB data input，5ms GTG，400nist，原生165hz刷新率；在DP1.4連接的情況下可以實現2K分辨率170hz（超頻）下，同時開啟8bitRGB444顏色，實際色彩過渡表現優秀，色深環節中評分為8分。



四、色彩精準度 10分（滿分10分）

色彩精準度方面，XG279Q最大色差值1.09，平均值0.27，表現極其出色，此項得分10分。


五、亮度對比度 8分（滿分10分）

亮度方面，XG279Q表現優秀，最大亮度能達到445.7nits；靜態對比度為1132.6:1，表現也非常出色，得分為8分。


六、可視角度 8分（滿分10分）

在可視角度方面的測試中，XG279Q在不同方向下的可視角度的表現都很不錯。不過在從下往上看，最上方會出現局部GLOW現象。整體表現8分。


七、頻閃和響應速度9分 （滿分10分）

通過我們的測試，XG279Q在各個亮度下均為全程DC調光。


雖然官方宣傳這塊友達6.6的快速液晶面板可以達到原生GTG1ms。但是我們通過測試發現，XG279Q要達到1ms的響應速度是通過OD加壓達到的1ms，菜單OD模式有5個等級，最高是5級，顯示器默認出廠的OD等級設置是3級，這裡建議大家關閉OD模式，OD模式會帶來鬼影現象。


在XG279Q的菜單中還有一個ROG特有的功能-ELMB SYNC，極低運動模糊同步技術。它能夠消除畫面的動態模糊問題使移動中的物體看起來更加清晰。其技術原理是通過 LED背光面板的快速屏閃並結合Adaptive-Sync刷新率同步技術協同工作。我們發現在ELMB SYNC這個模式下全程PWM調光。


我們更看重的是在平均水準下它相比常規的IPS面板究竟有多大的提升


從表格中我們可以看到，XG279Q的常規平均響應時間為6.36ms，比NanoIPS面板的XG270QG和Y27Q-20遜色一點。響應速度環節得分9分。

八、亮度色溫均勻度 9分（滿分10分）

XG279Q亮度均勻度方面表現非常優秀，亮度最大偏差百分比也只有7%，；色溫均勻度方面表現也很優秀，最大值控制在了3.2，得分9分。


九、刷新率、分辨率與HDR技術 10分（滿分15分）

XG279Q物理刷新率為170hz,2560×1440分辨率的顯示分辨率,VESA DisplayHDR400認證，在顯示器菜單界面中開啟超頻功能可以調節到最高的物理刷新率170hz；菜單功能中HDR有兩種模式，一種是遊戲模式的HDR，一種是電影模式的HDR。經過我們測試，開啟HDR後的畫面整體亮度暗沉，細節不如非HDR狀態下的畫面細膩，XG279Q整體HDR優化還需工廠進一步調校，建議玩遊戲的時候不開啟HDR。此項環節得分10分。


十、建議購買值（原性價比分值） 9分（滿分10分）

作為華碩推出的旗艦系列絕殺電競顯示器-ROG Strix XG279Q。全球首款搭載FastIPS面板的電競顯示器，搭配目前主流的2K顯示分辨率，以及超高的170hz物理刷新率、1ms、95% DCI-P3、VESA DisplayHDR 400、ELMB SYNC、NVIDIA G-SYNC兼容技術、2W x 2立體聲音響....等精質參數，全合金質的特色螺旋支架模具以及具有RGB燈效的ROG“敗家之眼”信仰加持，簡直可以說集“才華與美貌”與一身。目前官方的定價在4299元，個人覺得這個定價適中還是值得入手的一台顯示器。

總評

XG279Q的總得分為 90分。從得分上看，這款顯示器綜合參數測試下來還是非常出色的，FastIPS、2560×1440分辨率、170hz、1ms、95% DCI-P3、VESA DisplayHDR 400、ELMB SYNC、NVIDIA G-SYNC兼容技術、2W x 2立體聲音響....以及ROG獨有的“敗家之眼”信仰加持，搭配炫酷RGB氛圍燈效，渲染遊戲的氛圍也更遊戲沉浸感。如果你想嘗試下FastIPS面板的電競顯示器，XG279Q是一個非常不錯的選擇。

Unfortunately, this Dell monitor is not flicker-free. There is a very high-frequency flicker, as well as a 200Hz wobble. replies.msg:
用家測試
Just bought it and it’s 100% flicker-free as advertised. Manufactured on November 2019.

I haven’t noticed any flickering at all (I am very sensitive to it), so I did a simple test:

Prepare black screen with 1px wide vertical line in the middle. Set camera (RX100 v1) to manual mode (iso 200, F2.5, manual focus) with exposure 1/25. Quickly drag camera horizontally and shoot while dragging.

Flickering is clearly present on my cheap Samsung 2253LW: https://ibb.co/2PkzLFX

On U3219Q gray rectangle is perfectly even so light has the same intensity throughout the shot (brightness at 30%): https://ibb.co/J3bYQmn

If your statement would be correct in 1/25 of a second, at 200 hz there should be exactly 8 brighter and darker vertical areas evenly distributed over gray rectangle.

https://www.dell.com/community/Monitors/U3219Q-PWM-not-flicker-free/td-p/7198589

It was only recently that we reported on Samsung's decision to stop manufacturing all the LCD panels and focus on the production of AMOLED and QLED displays. However, it seems like Samsung will not be abandoning the LCD technology completely. According to a report from DigiTimes, we have information that Samsung will continue to offer LCD-based screens, TN-film, various kinds of VA, IPS, etc., by buying the LCD screen from a Japanese multinational company called Sharp. Sharp will be Samsung's only source of these LCD screens, so Samsung will still be able to offer products based on them. It is reported that types of panels in question are meant for the production of television devices, meaning that they are probably bigger-sized panels.

https://www.techpowerup.com/forums/threads/samsung-to-continue-buying-lcd-screens-from-sharp.265553/
